name: Risotto with Gorgonzola and Pistachios
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Saute onion until translucent, about 3 minutes.
3. Add rice and stir for 1 minute.
4. Add wine and stir until the liquid has evaporated.
5. Meanwhile, heat chicken stock to a low simmer in a separate saucepan.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and keep warm.
7. Add 1/2 cup of stock to rice and simmer until the liquid is absorbed, stirring frequently.
8. Continue adding remaining stock, 1/2 cup at a time, in the same manner, allowing each addition to be completely absorbed before adding more. This should take about 30 minutes. The rice will be done when tender but still slightly firm to the bite on the inside. Don't allow it to overcook and keep in mind you may not need all of the stock and you may find you need a bit more.
9. Add Gorgonzola and stir until melted.
10. Remove from heat. Season with pepper.
11. Stir in Parmesan, butter, and 3 tablespoons of pistachios.
12. Transfer to serving dish. Sprinkle with remaining pistachios.
